title: Magical Bundles
body:
This mod adds the capacity enchantment. With a max level of 2, capacity increases a bundles capacity according to the level. 1: 50% increase, 2: 100% increase. Capacity is a treasure enchantment, meaning that it cannot be obtained from the enchanting table.

Magical Bundles also supports modifying the enchantments effects using datapacks, just like vanilla.
